---
title: "Genre Decoded"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-label">A Spotify Data Story</div>
  <h1>Genres have <em>personalities</em> — but not as different as you'd think.</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">
    We analysed 28,000 songs across 6 genres using Spotify's audio fingerprints.
  </p>
</div>

<section class="scroll-section" id="genre-personality">
  <div class="scrolly" id="genre-scrolly">
    <div class="scrolly-steps" id="genre-steps">
      <div class="step is-active">
        <div class="step-label">Sonic Fingerprints</div>
        <h2>What makes a genre?</h2>
        <p>The radar chart shows the median traits for all genres. Use the filters below to compare specific styles.</p>
        <div id="slot-legend"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="scrolly-sticky">
      <div class="chart-panel" id="main-panel">
        <div id="slot-radar"></div>
        <div id="slot-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// 1. DATA AND STATE
genreProfiles = FileAttachment("data/processed/genre_profiles.json").json()

FEATURES = ["Danceability", "Energy", "Valence", "Acousticness", "Tempo", "Speechiness"]

GENRE_COLORS = ({
  "edm": "#1DB954", "latin": "#F72585", "pop": "#4CC9F0",
  "r&b": "#7B2D8B", "rap": "#F77F00", "rock": "#D62828"
})

mutable activeGenres = ["edm", "latin", "pop", "r&b", "rap", "rock"]

// 2. COMPONENTS
legendNode = {
  const container = html`<div class="legend-container"></div>`;
  Object.entries(GENRE_COLORS).forEach(([genre, color]) => {
    const btn = html`<button class="legend-item" style="--btn-color: ${color}">
      <span class="dot" style="background:${color}"></span>
      ${genre.toUpperCase()}
    </button>`;
    btn.onclick = () => {
      if (mutable activeGenres.includes(genre)) {
        mutable activeGenres = mutable activeGenres.filter(g => g !== genre);
      } else {
        mutable activeGenres = [...mutable activeGenres, genre];
      }
    };
    container.appendChild(btn);
  });
  return container;
}

radarNode = {
  const width = 300, height = 300, radius = 100;
  const svg = d3.create("svg").attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width, height]);
  const g = svg.append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${width/2},${height/2})`);
  g.append("circle").attr("r", radius).attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#333");
  g.append("text").attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("fill", "#666").attr("y", 5).text("RADAR");
  return svg.node();
}

barNode = {
  const width = 300, height = 300;
  const svg = d3.create("svg").attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width, height]);
  svg.append("rect").attr("x", 50).attr("y", 100).attr("width", 200).attr("height", 100).attr("fill", "#1DB954").attr("opacity", 0.3);
  svg.append("text").attr("x", 150).attr("y", 155).attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("fill", "#666").text("BARS");
  return svg.node();
}

// 3. INJECTION LOGIC
{
  const lt = document.getElementById("slot-legend");
  if (lt) { lt.innerHTML = ""; lt.appendChild(legendNode); }
  const rt = document.getElementById("slot-radar");
  if (rt) { rt.innerHTML = ""; rt.appendChild(radarNode); }
  const bt = document.getElementById("slot-bar");
  if (bt) { bt.innerHTML = ""; bt.appendChild(barNode); }
}
```

```{=html}
<style>
  /* 1. HIDE ALL SOURCE CODE OUTPUTS */
  .cell, .cell-code, .ojs-cell-output, .observablehq {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* 2. CHART LAYOUT */
  .chart-panel {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr !important;
    gap: 20px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: #141414;
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 1px solid #222;
  }

  #slot-radar, #slot-bar {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
  }

  svg {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 300px;
  }

  /* 3. LEGEND */
  .legend-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 15px;
  }
  .legend-item {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid #333;
    color: white;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; }

  @media (max-width: 800px) {
    .chart-panel { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
  }
</style>
